steps.title: Supply subject and verb
steps.content: The blank comes before 112th in a global ranking, so it must supply a subject and a linking verb. The subject is the constitution of Poland, which is singular, so the meaning needed is it is.

steps.title: Reject possessives and plurals
steps.content: Choice A is possessive and has no verb. Choice B gives a plural subject and verb. Choice D is also possessive and plural. The remaining contraction supplies the singular subject and linking verb required by the sentence. The answer is C.
